member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Authentications.AuthenticationInfo
member.summary: Default dictionary-backed implementation of . Used by authentication plugins to build auth bags, and by the framework for None-mode connections.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Authentications.AuthenticationInfo.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new instance with the specified mode.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Authentications.AuthenticationRegistry.Instance
member.summary: Singleton instance shared across the module lifetime.

member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Authentications.IAuthenticationProvider
member.summary: Defines an authentication provider plugin. Each authentication system (Azure, AWS, GCP) implements this interface to describe its supported auth modes and provide credential resolution. Discovered automatically at module load time via assembly scanning.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Authentications.IAuthenticationProvider.Name
member.summary: Unique name of this authentication provider (e.g. "AzAuth", "AwsAuth", "GcpAuth").

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Authentications.IAuthenticationProvider.GetAuthParameters
member.summary: Dynamic parameters this provider needs for authentication (e.g. TenantId, ClientId, ConnectionString, AccessKeyId). Added to Connect-PSDataRepository when a provider declares supported auth modes that intersect with this auth provider.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Authentications.IAuthenticationProvider.Resolve(PSDataRepository.Abstractions.IConnectContext)
member.summary: Creates an from the connect context. Called by Connect-PSDataRepository after the user provides auth parameters.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Authentications.IAuthenticationProvider.DetectMode(PSDataRepository.Abstractions.IConnectContext)
member.summary: Detects which authentication mode (if any) the user has provided parameters for. Returns null if no mode can be detected from the given context.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Authentications.IAuthenticationRegistry.GetProvider(System.String)
member.summary: Gets an auth provider by name (case-insensitive).

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Authentications.IAuthenticationRegistry.FindByMode(System.String)
member.summary: Finds the best authentication provider for the given auth mode. Returns the first provider that supports the mode, or null.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Authentications.IAuthenticationRegistry.Clear
member.summary: Removes all registered authentication providers. Used during module reload/testing.
